nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_forecast: Areas Of Fog then Mostly Cloudy
nyc.today_detail: Areas of fog and a chance of rain showers before 11am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 53. Northeast wind around 16 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
